mapper.sql: id, username, password, salt, email, type, status, header_url, create_time, policy_version, security_version
id, username, password, salt, email, type, status, header_url, create_time, mute_until, ban_until, policy_version, security_version
mapper.update: update user set header_url = #{headerUrl} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}
mapper.insert: insert into user_policy_version_counter(id, current_version) values(#{id}, 0) on duplicate key update current_version = current_version
mapper.select: select current_version from user_policy_version_counter where id = #{id} for update
mapper.insert: insert into user_security_version_counter(id, current_version) values(#{id}, 0) on duplicate key update current_version = current_version
mapper.select: select current_version from user_security_version_counter where id = #{id} for update

select id, username, header_url, type from user where id in
#{id, jdbcType=BINARY}
